data.text/markdown:
Week 3: Dimensional Modeling

Agenda:

  • two kinds of data processing: transactional and analytical
    • transactional processing - focuses on processing the data generated by everyday business processes
    • analytical processing - focuses on data investigation, analysis, and asking it questions
  • Demo: comparing relational and dimensional model execution
  • Dimensioal Data Modeling
    • star schema, facts, and dimensions
    • the kimball model walkthrough
    • 3 types of facts
  • Pipeline Project: next steps
  • Week 2 assignment

Transactional processing and analytical processing high level overview

At the highest level, transactional processing focuses on managing in real-time, the data of discrete business processes.

Transactions can be broken into three core components:
  1. the event
  2. the payload
  3. the system guarantee

analytical processing is about understanding. It focuses on

  1. investigating the data
  2. analyzing the data
  3. asking questions

Dimensional modeling: working definition

Dimensional modeling is a design technique that takes data and reorganizes around a business process in a way that is optimized for retrieval, understandability, and analytical peformance. In doing this it creates a framework that mirrors how businesses actually ask questions.

Demo

In this demo we will compare requesting the same data from a relational model and a dimensional model The data consists of 25,000 customers, 1000 products, 12.5 million orders, and 25 million order items. business scenario: For years, the company has operated under a Uniform Nationwide Strategy, assuming that customer behavior and product demand were consistent across the country. They are re-evaluating this strategy and need to see if certain product categories dominate specific regions and how those patterns change when looking at high-intent "weekend" shoppers versus weekday browsers. General Question: "How does product category performance vary across US Census Divisions and States, and what specific geographic clusters demonstrate the highest revenue growth during peak weekend periods?" specific question: "During the weekend shopping periods of Q3 2025, what was the total revenue for each product category within each Region, and what percentage of the total regional revenue did each category represent?"

Discecting the dimensional model

  1. the start schema - 4 tables instead of 10
  2. denormalized table

Dimensional Modeling Walkthrough

Dimensional modeling steps: (the kimball method)
  1. identify the business process
  2. define the grain
  3. identify the dimensions
  4. identify the facts

Pipeline Project: Next steps

  1. Reviewing the poll/fetch/commit cycle
  2. separate incomplete records from complete records. affected columns: (those that can have a null value)
    • visitor.home_state
    • visitor_spending.amount
    • visits.park_id
    • visits.lodging_type_id

updated requirement

The API maintainer has informed you that the API backend has been unstable lately and accessing the API under certain conditions will exacerbate the instability. They have given you the following requirements:
  1. before hitting any other api endpoint, even the polling enpoint, you must run a healtcheck on the api.
  2. If the healthcheck reports either a database latency or a data refresh status that is anything other than OK, you must halt the current data collection activity.
So, what you have to do is implement healthcheck logic before executing the poll/fetch/commit cycle
Weekly Assignment
